description.value: > Arcane Researcher Your curiosity and ingenuity have driven you to experiment and push new boundaries, and you have a knack for tampering with magic. You gain a +4 trait bonus on Knowledge (arcana) and Spellcraft checks to research, modify, and create new spells.
